policyname: system_create_access
users_mark_read_access
qual:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users
  WHERE ((users.id = auth.uid()) AND (users.is_super_admin = true)))) OR ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users
  WHERE ((users.id = auth.uid()) AND (users.is_admin = true) AND (users.company_id = notifications.company_id)))) OR (user_id = auth.uid())) OR ((user_id = auth.uid()) OR ((company_id IN ( SELECT users.company_id
   FROM users
  WHERE ((users.id = auth.uid()) AND (users.company_id IS NOT NULL)))) AND (NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users
  WHERE ((users.id = auth.uid()) AND (users.is_admin = true))))))))

   FROM users
  WHERE ((users.id = auth.uid()) AND (users.is_admin = true)))))))
